_comment: Flight phase detection rules and ATC state machine guards. phase_thresholds define sensor values for FlightPhase transitions. hysteresis prevents phase jitter with time delays. intent_preconditions block invalid pilot intents based on current flight phase (e.g., taxi request while airborne) with configurable rejection messages. auto_corrections fix state/phase mismatches after a delay (e.g., airborne after departure clearance -> auto-transition to PATTERN_ENTRY). intent_frequency restricts which intents are valid on which frequency type (GROUND, TOWER, UNICOM). pilot_phraseology provides example phrases per intent for UI display.

INITIAL_CALL_GROUND.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be airborne. Say intentions.

INITIAL_CALL_TOWER.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, you are already airborne, report your position.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND.rejection_ground: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be on the ground.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND_VRP.rejection_ground: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be on the ground.

INITIAL_CALL_APPROACH.rejection_ground: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be on the ground.

REQUEST_TAXI.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be airborne.

REQUEST_TAXI_PARKING.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be airborne.

REPORT_POSITION.rejection_ground: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be on the ground.

REPORT_POSITION_DOWNWIND.rejection_ground: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be on the ground.

REPORT_POSITION_BASE.rejection_ground: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be on the ground.

REPORT_POSITION_FINAL.rejection_ground: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be on the ground.

REQUEST_LANDING.rejection_ground: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be on the ground.

REQUEST_TOUCH_AND_GO.rejection_ground: {callsign}, unable, you appear to be on the ground.

RUNWAY_VACATED.rejection_airborne: {callsign}, unable, you appear to still be airborne.

LEAVING_FREQUENCY.rejection_ground: {callsign}, unable, you are still on the ground.

on_tower_freq.log: pilot tuned Tower while taxi-cleared, advancing handoff
pilot tuned Tower from GROUND_CONTACT, advancing

REQUEST_TAXI_PARKING.rejection: {callsign}, contact Ground for taxi to parking.

REQUEST_FLIGHT_FOLLOWING.rejection: {callsign}, flight following service is not available in this region.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE.rejection: {callsign}, contact Tower when ready for departure.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR.rejection: {callsign}, contact Tower when ready for departure.

REQUEST_TOUCH_AND_GO.rejection: {callsign}, contact Tower for touch and go.

pilot_phraseology.INITIAL_CALL_GROUND: {airport} {taxi_controller}, {callsign}{aircraft_type_phrase}, at the parking, request taxi, information {atis_letter}
pilot_phraseology.INITIAL_CALL_TOWER: {airport} Tower, {callsign}{aircraft_type_phrase}, holding short runway {runway}, ready for departure
pilot_phraseology.INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND: {airport} Tower, {callsign}{aircraft_type_phrase}, inbound for landing, request joining instructions
pilot_phraseology.INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND_VRP: {airport} Tower, {callsign}{aircraft_type_phrase}, over {entry_vrp}, inbound for landing, information {atis_letter}
pilot_phraseology.READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR: {airport} Tower, {callsign}, runway {runway}, ready for departure, on course

_state_machine_guards_comment: Tables consumed by atc_state_machine::process. state_frequency_validity: when current freq doesn't match the listed states for that freq type, atc_state_machine resets to IDLE. idle_redirects: in IDLE state, a matching intent + freq combo emits the configured response and stays in IDLE. state_reverts: pilot re-issues an intent while in `in_state` -> revert to `revert_to` so the request reroutes. tower_only_auto_advance: at airports with no Ground controller, the listed states auto-advance after the standard taxi handoff. frequency_hint: rendered when freq_type is UNKNOWN at a towered airport.

idle_redirects.log: REQUEST_TAXI on Tower freq -> redirect to ground

idle_redirects.response: {callsign}, contact tower when ready for departure.
idle_redirects.log: READY_FOR_DEPARTURE on Ground freq -> redirect to tower

state_reverts.log: Re-clearance: reverting Pattern/DEPARTURE_CLEARED -> TOWER_CONTACT for re-evaluation
Re-clearance: reverting XC/DEPARTURE_CLEARED -> TOWER_CONTACT for re-evaluation

frequency_hint.ground_response: {callsign}, you are not on the correct frequency. Contact {airport} Ground on {ground_frequency}.
frequency_hint.tower_response: {callsign}, you are not on the correct frequency. Contact {airport} Tower on {tower_frequency}.
